feedback.text: I am glad to see that the EU is willing to introduce legislation to protect consumers of digital products, such as game licenses. That we as consumers may lose access to products we have rightly paid for, at the whims of the companies who exercise these dark patterns, is worrying. I know you've gotten tons of feedback on this topic already, but I cannot stress it enough: the EU has to be a bulwark against these exploitative (if not outright corrupt) practices, or this issue will continue to grow exponentially.
